title: All things Gantt
excerpt: There we some threads about Gantt throughout the years, but I wonder how the situation with Gantt Chart in monday looks NOW. What are your main pain points regarding Gantt? What do you lack of? What is “okay” but could b…

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: There we some threads about Gantt throughout the years, but I wonder how the situation with Gantt Chart in monday looks NOW. What are your main pain points regarding Gantt? What do you lack of? What is “okay” but could be improved?

posts.author: tode (Tomas Deckert)
posts.cookedHtml: More levels of tasks hierarchy in the board for Gantt.

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree, working with precisely curated set of subitems with its’ own deadlines should be possible also on a Gantt level. Thank you Tomas!
